# BORJA MOSKV Agentic API

This site contains public information regarding BORJA MOSKV's musical releases, visual artworks, and technical infrastructure.

## Available content
- [Music releases](https://borjamoskv.com/#musica)
- [Visuals](https://borjamoskv.com/#video)
- [Blog/Diary](https://borjamoskv.com/blog.html)

All content is C5-REAL validated and cryptographic provenance is enforced where applicable.
